title: Egress check blocks outbound when no_egress=true
description: check_egress should raise EgressViolationError in air-gapped mode
clause: GA-09-REQ-01: Egress MUST be blocked when no_egress is configured

title: Compliance mapper evaluates all six frameworks
description: ComplianceMapper should return results for SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR, NIST_AI_RMF, EU_AI_ACT, ISO_42001
clause: GA-02-REQ-01: Compliance mapper MUST support all six compliance frameworks
